## Phases

> Provisional, derived from DESIGN §14. The plan files (`plan/phase-NN-*.md`) and the final phase
> breakdown are generated by `/implement:plan`; statuses start unchecked.

| #   | Phase                                                                                          | File                              | Status |
| --- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------- | ------ |
| 1   | Bootstrap repo + packaging + port reusable engine + build polling core (diff/tick/daemon); CI green (unit + local-real) | phase-01-bootstrap-engine.md      | [ ]    |
| 2   | Installer 3 tiers (install/uninstall/doctor) + PM2 daemon wiring + plugin marketplace + `validate` gate | phase-02-installer-plugin.md      | [ ]    |
| 3   | Hardening H3 (pagination) · H4 (perms materialised) · H5 (kill-switch)                          | phase-03-hardening.md             | [ ]    |
| 4   | Real GraphQL fixtures (H6) + integration CI against a test org (H7)                             | phase-04-integration-ci.md        | [ ]    |
| 5   | Sticky comments (§8.1) + Cancel column (§8.2) + heartbeat (§8.3) wiring; docs; cutover + decommission | phase-05-features-cutover.md      | [ ]    |

## Notes

- **Ingress = unified polling** (no n8n/webhooks). Hardening items H1/H2 are erased by the polling
  pivot (DESIGN §6).
- **Pre-implementation gate**: re-sync the latest PoC code (sticky comments, Cancel, heartbeat #67)
  from `PersonalScraper/.claude/skills/kanban/` before porting (DESIGN §11).
- Default poll interval 10 s + cheap-probe + adaptive idle back-off.
- GitHub token scope: `project` + `repo` only (no `admin:org_hook`).
